result.caveats: More details about the indicators are available in the links in the dataset description.

result.name: who-data-for-rwa
result.notes:
This dataset contains data from WHO's [data portal](https://www.who.int/gho/en/) covering the following categories:  
  
Air pollution, Child mortality, Dementia diagnosis, treatment and care, Environment and health, Food safety, Global Dementia Observatory (GDO), Global Health Estimates: Life expectancy and leading causes of death and disability, Global Information System on Alcohol and Health, Global Patient Safety Observatory, HIV, Health financing, Health systems, Health taxes, Health workforce, Hepatitis, Immunization coverage and vaccine-preventable diseases, Malaria, Maternal and reproductive health, Mental health, Neglected tropical diseases, Noncommunicable diseases, Nutrition, Oral Health, Priority health technologies, Resources for Substance Use Disorders, Road Safety, Sexually Transmitted Infections, Substance use disorders service coverage, Tobacco control, Tuberculosis, Universal health coverage (UHC), SDG Target 3.8, Vaccine-preventable communicable diseases, Violence prevention, Water, sanitation and hygiene (WASH), World Health Statistics.  
  
For links to individual indicator metadata, see resource descriptions.

organization.name: world-health-organization
organization.title: World Health Organization
organization.description:
The World Health Organization (WHO) is the United Nations agency that connects nations, partners and people to promote health, keep the world safe and serve the vulnerable – so everyone, everywhere can attain the highest level of health.

The Organization leads global efforts to expand universal health coverage. It directs and coordinates the world’s response to health emergencies. It promotes healthier lives – from pregnancy care through old age. The Triple Billion targets outline an ambitious plan for the world to achieve good health for all using science-based policies and programmes.

resources.name: All Health Indicators for Rwanda

resources.description:
*Health systems:*
[Care-seeking by type of patient and source of care (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/sources-of-care-in-mixed-health-systems), [Total density per 100 000 population: Hospitals](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-hospitals), [Total density per 100 000 population: Health posts](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-health-posts), [Total density per 100 000 population: Health centres](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-health-centres), [Total density per 100 000 population: District/rural hospitals](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-district-rural-hospitals), [Total density per 100 000 population: Provincial hospitals](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-provincial-hospitals), [Total density per 100 000 population: Specialized hospitals](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-specialized-hospitals), [Hospital beds (per 10 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hospital-beds-%28per-10-000-population%29)

[Estimated number of malaria cases](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-number-of-malaria-cases), [Estimated number of malaria deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-number-of-malaria-deaths), [Number of confirmed malaria cases](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-confirmed-malaria-cases), [Estimated malaria incidence (per 1000 population at risk)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/malaria-incidence-%28per-1-000-population-at-risk%29), [Estimated malaria mortality rate (per 100 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-malaria-mortality-rate-per-100-000-population), [Number of imported malaria cases](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-imported-malaria-cases), [Number of indigenous malaria microscopy](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-malaria-suspects-examined-by-microscopy), [Number of indigenous P. falciparum malaria cases](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-indigenous-p.-falciparum-malaria-cases), [Number of presumed malaria *Neglected tropical diseases:*
[Number of new reported cases of human African trypanosomiasis (T.b. gambiense)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hat-tb-gambiense), [Number of new reported cases of human African trypanosomiasis (T.b. rhodesiense)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-new-reported-cases-of-human-african-trypanosomiasis-%28t-b-rhodesiense%29), [Status of elimination of trachoma as a public health problem](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/status-of-elimination-of-trachoma-as-a-public-health-problem), [Population in areas that warrant treatment with antibiotics, facial cleanliness and environmental improvement for elimination of trachoma as a public health problem](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/population-in-areas-that-warrant-treatment-with-antibiotics-facial-cleanliness-and-environmental-improvement-for-elimination-of-trachoma-as-a-public-health-problem), [Number of people who received treatment with antibiotics for trachoma](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-people-who-received-treatment-with-antibiotics-for-trachoma), [Number of confirmed cases of Buruli ulcer reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-confirmed-cases-of-buruli-ulcer-reported), [Status of endemicity of Buruli ulcer](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/buruli-ulcer), [Number of suspected cases of Buruli ulcer reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-new-reported-cases-of-buruli-ulcer), [Estimated number of individuals in the country requiring preventive chemotherapy for onchocerciasis](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-number-of-individuals-in-the-country-requiring-preventive-chemotherapy-for-onchocerciasis), [Status of endemicity of onchocerciasis](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/status-of-endemicity-of-onchocerciasis), [Reported number of individuals treated for onchocerciasis](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/reported-number-of-individuals-treated-for-onchocerciasis), [Number of people operated for trachomatous trichiasis](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-people-operated-for-trachomatous-trichiasis), [Status of endemicity of Taenia solium](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/status-of-endemicity-of-taenia-solium), [Number of pigs in the country](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/taenia-solium-number-of-pigs-in-the-country), [Practice of backyard pig production](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/taenia-solium-practice-of-backyard-pig-production), [Status of yaws endemicity](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/status-of-yaws-endemicity), [Number of confirmed yaws cases reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-confirmed-cases-of-yaws-reported)

*World Health Statistics:*
[Number of deaths among children 5 to 14 years of age](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-children-ages-5-to-14-years), [Mortality rate for 5-14 year-olds (probability of dying per 1000 children aged 5-14 years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-for-5-14-year-olds-%28probability-of-dying-per-1000-children-aged-5-14-years%29), [Number of under-five deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-under-five-deaths), [Number of infant deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-infant-deaths), [Number of neonatal deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-neonatal-deaths), [Number of deaths among children ages 5 to 9 years](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-children-ages-5-to-9-years), [Number of deaths among adolescents (10 to 19 years of age)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-adolescents-10-19-years-of-age), [Households with out-of-pocket payments greater than 40% of capacity to pay for health care (food, housing and utilities approach - developed by WHO/Europe) (%, national)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/households-with-out-of-pocket-payments-greater-than-40-of-capacity-to-pay-for-health-care-%28food-housing-and-utilities-approach---developed-by-who-europe%29-%28-%29), [Population with household spending on health greater than 10% of total household budget (SDG 3.8.2, estimated data) resources.description:
*Child mortality:*
[Number of deaths among children 5 to 14 years of age](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-children-ages-5-to-14-years), [Mortality rate for 5-14 year-olds (probability of dying per 1000 children aged 5-14 years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-for-5-14-year-olds-%28probability-of-dying-per-1000-children-aged-5-14-years%29), [Number of under-five deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-under-five-deaths), [Number of infant deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-infant-deaths), [Number of neonatal deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-neonatal-deaths), [Number of deaths among children ages 5 to 9 years](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-children-ages-5-to-9-years), [Number of deaths among adolescents (10 to 19 years of age)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-adolescents-10-19-years-of-age), [Infant mortality rate (probability of dying between birth and age 1 per 1000 live births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/infant-mortality-rate-%28probability-of-dying-between-birth-and-age-1-per-1000-live-births%29), [Under-five mortality rate (probability of dying by age 5 per 1000 live births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/under-five-mortality-rate-%28probability-of-dying-by-age-5-per-1000-live-births%29), [Adolescent mortality rate (per 1 000 age specific cohort)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/adolescent-mortality-rate-per-1000-age-specific-cohort), [Number of deaths in children aged <5 years, by cause](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths), [Deaths per 1 000 live births](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/deaths-per-1-000-live-births), [Distribution of causes of death among children aged < 5 years (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/distribution-of-causes-of-death-among-children-aged-5-years-%28-%29), [Neonatal mortality rate (per 1000 live births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/neonatal-mortality-rate-%28per-1000-live-births%29), [Stillbirth rate (per 1000 total births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/stillbirth-rate-%28per-1000-total-births%29), [Mortality rate among children ages 5 to 9 years (per 1000 children aged 5)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-among-children-ages-5-to-9-years-%28per-1000-children-aged-5%29)

resources.description:
*Maternal and reproductive health:*
[Adolescent birth rate (per 1000 women)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/adolescent-birth-rate-%28per-1000-women-aged-15-19-years%29), [Births attended by skilled health personnel (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/births-attended-by-skilled-health-personnel-%28-%29), [Number of women of reproductive age (aged 15-49 years) with anaemia (thousands)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/anaemia-in-women-of-reproductive-age-number-%28in-thousands%29), [Prevalence of anaemia in women of reproductive age (aged 15-49) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-anaemia-in-women-of-reproductive-age-%28-%29), [Proportion of births delivered in a health facility (Facility births) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/institutional-births-%28-%29), [Births by caesarean section (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/births-by-caesarean-section-%28-%29), [Antenatal care coverage - at least four visits (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/antenatal-care-coverage-at-least-four-visits)

resources.description:
*Air pollution:*
[Household air pollution attributable deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/household-air-pollution-attributable-deaths), [Household air pollution attributable DALYs](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/household-air-pollution-attributable-dalys), [Household air pollution attributable DALYs (per 100 000, age-standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/household-air-pollution-attributable-dalys-%28per-100-000-age-standardized%29), [Ambient air pollution attributable deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ambient-air-pollution-attributable-deaths), [Ambient air pollution attributable death rate (per 100 000 population, age-standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ambient-air-pollution-attributable-death-rate-%28per-100-000-population-age-standardized%29), [Household air pollution attributable death rate (per 100 000 population, age-standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/household-air-pollution-attributable-death-rate-%28per-100-000-population-age-standardized%29), [Household and ambient air pollution attributable DALYs](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ambient-air-pollution-attributable-dalys), [Household and ambient air pollution attributable DALYs (per 100 000 capita, age-standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ambient-air-pollution-attributable-dalys-per-100000population), [Ambient air pollution attributable DALYs](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mbd-aap-ambient-air-pollution-attributable-dalys), [Ambient air pollution attributable DALYs  (per 100 000 population, age-standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ambient-air-pollution-attributable-dalys-%28per-100-000-population-age-standardized%29), [Population with primary reliance on fuels and technologies for cooking, by fuel type (in millions)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/population-with-primary-reliance-on-fuels-and-technologies-for-cooking-by-fuel-type), [Population with primary reliance on clean fuels and technologies for cooking (in millions)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-phe-population-with-primary-reliance-on-clean-fuels-and-technologies-in-millions), [Population with primary reliance on polluting fuels and technologies for cooking (in millions)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/population-with-primary-reliance-on-polluting-fuels-and-technologies-for-cooking-%28in-millions%29), [Proportion of population with primary reliance on fuels and technologies for cooking, by fuel type (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/proportion-of-population-with-primary-reliance-on-fuels-and-technologies-for-cooking-by-fuel-type), [Proportion of population with primary reliance on clean fuels and technologies for cooking (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-phe-primary-reliance-on-clean-fuels-and-technologies-proportion), [Proportion of population with primary reliance on polluting fuels and technologies for cooking (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-phe-population-with-primary-reliance-on-polluting-fuels-and-technologies-for-cooking-proportion), [Alcohol-attributable DALYs per 100,000 people (age standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-attributable-dalys--age-standardized-rates-%28all-ages%29--per-100-000-population), [Percent of all DALYs attributable to alcohol](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/percent-of-all-dalys-attributable-to-alcohol-%2815-%29), [Alcohol-attributable DALYs lost from all causes (all ages), (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-attributable-dalys-lost-from-all-causes-%28all-ages%29-%28number%29), [Ambient and household air pollution attributable death rate (per 100 000 population, age-standardized)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ambient-and-household-air-pollution-attributable-deaths), [Concentrations of fine particulate matter (PM2.5)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/concentrations-of-fine-particulate-matter-%28pm2-5%29), [Mortality rate attributed to unintentional poisoning (per 100 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-attributed-to-unintentional-poisoning-%28per-100-000-population%29), [Mortality rate attributed to exposure to unsafe WASH services (per 100 000 population) (SDG 3.9.2)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-attributed-to-exposure-to-unsafe-wash-services-%28per-100-000-population%29-%28sdg-3-9-2%29)

resources.description:
*Global Dementia Observatory (GDO):*
[Total density per 100 000 population: Hospitals](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-100-000-population-hospitals), [Identification of other plans in which dementia is integrated (Ageing)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/identification-of-other-plans-in-which-dementia-is-integrated-%28ageing%29), [Identification of other plans in which dementia is integrated (Disability)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/identification-of-other-plans-in-which-dementia-is-integrated-%28disability%29), [Identification of other plans in which dementia is integrated (Mental health)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/identification-of-other-plans-in-which-dementia-is-integrated-%28mental-health%29), [Identification of other plans in which dementia is integrated (NCD)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/identification-of-other-plans-in-which-dementia-is-integrated-%28ncd%29), [National regulator approval of anti-dementia medication](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/national-regulator-approval-of-anti-dementia-medication), [Availability of generic anti-dementia medication](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/availability-of-generic-anti-dementia-medication), [Availability of at least one anti-dementia medication approved for on-label use reimbursement](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/availability-of-at-least-one-anti-dementia-medication-approved-for-on-label-use-reimbursement), [Availability of atleast one adult hygiene products for people with dementia](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-gdo-GDO_q10x2_1AVAIL), [Availability of atleast one housing adjustment for people with dementia](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/availability-of-atleast-one-housing-adjustment-for-people-with-dementia), [Availability of  atleast one assistive technology for people with dementia](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/availability-of-atleast-one-assistive-technology-for-people-with-dementia), [Existence of dementia national nongovernmental organization](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-dementia-national-nongovernmental-organization), [Dementia nongovernmental organization equipped with office](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/dementia-nongovernmental-organization-equipped-with-office-), [Dementia nongovernmental organization office branches resources.name: Global Dementia Observatory (GDO) Indicators for Rwanda

resources.description:
*Global Health Estimates: Life expectancy and leading causes of death and disability:*
[Number of deaths among children 5 to 14 years of age](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-children-ages-5-to-14-years), [Mortality rate for 5-14 year-olds (probability of dying per 1000 children aged 5-14 years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-for-5-14-year-olds-%28probability-of-dying-per-1000-children-aged-5-14-years%29), [Number of under-five deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-under-five-deaths), [Number of infant deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-infant-deaths), [Number of neonatal deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-neonatal-deaths), [Number of deaths among children ages 5 to 9 years](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-children-ages-5-to-9-years), [Number of deaths among adolescents (10 to 19 years of age)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-among-adolescents-10-19-years-of-age), [Infant mortality rate (probability of dying between birth and age 1 per 1000 live births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/infant-mortality-rate-%28probability-of-dying-between-birth-and-age-1-per-1000-live-births%29), [Under-five mortality rate (probability of dying by age 5 per 1000 live births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/under-five-mortality-rate-%28probability-of-dying-by-age-5-per-1000-live-births%29), [Age-standardized suicide rates (per 100 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/age-standardized-suicide-rates-%28per-100-000-population%29), [Adolescent mortality rate (per 1 000 age specific cohort)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/adolescent-mortality-rate-per-1000-age-specific-cohort), [Number of deaths in children aged <5 years, by cause](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths), [Deaths per 1 000 live births](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/deaths-per-1-000-live-births), [Distribution of causes of death among children aged < 5 years (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/distribution-of-causes-of-death-among-children-aged-5-years-%28-%29), [Number of maternal deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-maternal-deaths), [Probability (%) of dying between age 30 and exact age 70 from any of cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/probability-of-dying-between-exact-ages-30-and-70-from-any-of-cardiovascular-disease-cancer-diabetes-or-chronic-respiratory-%28-%29), [Total NCD Deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-ghe-ncd-deaths-in-thousands), [Premature deaths due to noncommunicable diseases (NCD) as a proportion of all NCD deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ncd-deaths-under-age-70-%28percent-of-all-ncd-deaths%29), [Estimated road traffic death rate (per 100 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-road-traffic-death-rate-%28per-100-000-population%29), [Distribution of road traffic deaths by type of road user (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/distribution-of-road-traffic-deaths-by-type-of-road-user-%28-%29), [Mortality rate attributed to unintentional poisoning (per 100 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-attributed-to-unintentional-poisoning-%28per-100-000-population%29), [Crude suicide rates (per 100 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/crude-suicide-rates-%28per-100-000-population%29), [Life expectancy at birth (years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/life-expectancy-at-birth-%28years%29), [Healthy life expectancy (HALE) at birth (years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-ghe-hale-healthy-life-expectancy-at-birth), [Neonatal mortality rate (per 1000 live births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/neonatal-mortality-rate-%28per-1000-live-births%29), [Adult mortality rate (probability of dying between 15 and 60 years per 1000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/adult-mortality-rate-%28probability-of-dying-between-15-and-60-years-per-1000-population%29), [Healthy life expectancy (HALE) at age 60 (years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/gho-ghe-hale-healthy-life-expectancy-at-age-60), [Stillbirth rate (per 1000 total births)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/stillbirth-rate-%28per-1000-total-births%29), [Life expectancy at age 60 (years)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/life-expectancy-at-age-60-%28years%29), [Mortality rate among children ages 5 to 9 years (per 1000 children aged 5)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-among-children-ages-5-to-9-years-%28per-1000-children-aged-5%29)

*Global Information System on Alcohol and Health:*
[Alcohol, recorded per capita (15+) consumption (in litres of pure alcohol), by beverage type](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-recorded-per-capita-%2815-%29-consumption-%28in-litres-of-pure-alcohol%29), [Alcohol, drinkers only per capita (15+) consumption in litres of pure alcohol, three-year average](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-drinkers-only-per-capita-%2815-%29consumption-in-litres-of-pure-alcohol), [Alcohol, abstainers lifetime (%), age-standardized](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-abstainers-lifetime-%28-%29), [Alcohol, abstainers past 12 months (%), age-standardized](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-abstainers-past-12-months-%28-%29), [Alcohol, consumers past 12 months (%), age-standardized](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-consumers-past-12-months-%28-%29), [Alcohol, former drinkers (%), age-standardized](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-former-drinkers-%28-%29), [Awareness activities](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/awareness-activities), [Alcohol, total per capita (15+) consumption (in litres of pure alcohol) (SDG Indicator 3.5.2), three-year average](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-%28recorded-unrecorded%29-alcohol-per-capita-%2815-%29-consumption), [Alcohol, heavy episodic drinking (15+) past 30 days (%), age-standardized](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-heavy-episodic-drinking-%2815-%29-past-30-days-%28-%29-age-standardized-with-95-ci), [Alcohol, recorded per capita (15+) consumption (in litres of pure alcohol), three-year average](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-recorded-per-capita-%2815-%29-consumption-%28in-litres-of-pure-alcohol%29-3-year-average-with-95-ci), [Alcohol, average daily intake in grams among drinkers, three-year average](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/alcohol-average-daily-intake-in-grams-among-drinkers-with-95-ci), [15-19 years old, current drinkers (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/15-19-years-old-current-drinkers-%28-%29), [National guidelines for the prevention and reduction of alcohol-related harm in schools](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/national-guidelines-for-the-prevention-and-reduction-of-alcohol-related-harm-in-schools), [National guidelines for alcohol problem prevention and counselling at workplaces](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/national-guidelines-for-alcohol-problem-prevention-and-counselling-at-workplaces), [Server training](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/server-training), [Legislation on alcohol testing at workplaces](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/legislation-on-alcohol-testing-at-workplaces), [Standard drink defined](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/standard-drink-defined), [National systems for monitoring alcohol consumption and harms](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/national-systems-for-monitoring-alcohol-consumption-and-harms), [National surveys on adult alcohol consumption](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/national-surveys-on-adult-alcohol-consumption), [National surveys on youth alcohol consumption](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/national-surveys-on-youth-alcohol-consumption), [National system of epidemiological data collection for alcohol *HIV:*
[Estimated number of people (all ages) living with HIV](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-number-of-people--living-with-hiv), [Number of people dying from HIV-related causes](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-deaths-due-to-hiv-aids), [Testing and counselling facilities, reported number](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hiv-testing-and-counselling---testing-and-counselling-facilities), [Testing and counselling facilities, estimated number per 100 000 adult population](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hiv-testing-and-counselling---testing-and-counselling-facilities), [Reported number of people receiving antiretroviral therapy](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/reported-number-of-people-receiving-antiretroviral-therapy), [Reported number of children receiving antiretroviral therapy](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/reported-number-of-children-receiving-antiretroviral-therapy), [Number of pregnant women living with HIV who received antiretrovirals for preventing mother-to-child transmission](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-pregnant-women-living-with-hiv-who-received-antiretrovirals-for-preventing-mother-to-child-transmission), [Estimated number of pregnant women living with HIV](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-percentage-of-pregnant-women-living-with-hiv-who-received-antiretrovirals-for-preventing-mother-to-child-transmission), [Estimated number of pregnant women living with HIV needing antiretrovirals for preventing mother-to-child transmission](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-number-of-pregnant-women-living-with-hiv-needing-antiretrovirals-for-preventing-mother-to-child-transmission), [Estimated number of children needing antiretroviral therapy based on WHO methods](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-number-of-children-needing-antiretroviral-therapy-based-on-who-methods), [Estimated antiretroviral therapy coverage among children](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-antiretroviral-therapy-coverage-among-children), [Testing and counselling facilities, reporting period](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hiv-testing-and-counselling---testing-and-counselling-facilities), [Number of new HIV infections](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-new-hiv-infections), [Estimated antiretroviral therapy coverage among people living with HIV (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/estimated-antiretroviral-therapy-coverage-among-people-living-with-hiv-%28-%29), [Percentage of HIV-positive results returned to people in the calendar year](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hiv-testing-volume-and-positivity), [Prevalence of HIV among adults aged 15 to 49 (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-hiv-among-adults-aged-15-to-49-%28-%29), [New HIV infections (per 1000 uninfected population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/new-hiv-infections-%28per-1000-uninfected-population%29)

resources.description:
*Health financing:*
[Current health expenditure (CHE) as percentage of gross domestic product (GDP) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/current-health-expenditure-%28che%29-as-percentage-of-gross-domestic-product-%28gdp%29-%28-%29), [Current health expenditure (CHE) per capita in US$](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/current-health-expenditure-%28che%29-per-capita-in-us-dollar), [External health expenditure (EXT) as percentage of current health expenditure (CHE) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/external-health-expenditure-%28ext%29-as-percentage-of-current-health-expenditure-%28che%29-%28-%29), [External health expenditure (EXT) per capita in US$](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/external-health-expenditure-%28ext%29-per-capita-in-us), [Domestic general government health expenditure (GGHE-D) as percentage of current health expenditure (CHE) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/domestic-general-government-health-expenditure-%28gche-d%29-as-percentage-of-current-health-expenditure), [Domestic general government health expenditure (GGHE-D) as percentage of gross domestic product (GDP) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/domestic-general-government-health-expenditure-%28gghe-d%29-as-percentage-of-gross-domestic-product-%28gdp%29-%28-%29), [Domestic general government health expenditure (GGHE-D) as percentage of general government expenditure (GGE) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/domestic-general-government-health-expenditure-%28gghe-d%29-as-percentage-of-general-government-expenditure-%28gge%29), [Domestic general government health expenditure (GGHE-D) per capita in US$](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/domestic-general-government-health-expenditure-%28gghe-d%29-per-capita-in-us), [Out-of-pocket expenditure as percentage of current health expenditure (CHE) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/out-of-pocket-expenditure-as-percentage-of-current-health-expenditure-%28che%29-%28-%29), [Out-of-pocket expenditure (OOP) per capita in US$](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/out-of-pocket-expenditure-%28oop%29-per-capita-in-us), [Domestic private health expenditure (PVT-D) as percentage of current health expenditure (CHE) (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/domestic-private-health-expenditure-%28pvt-d%29-as-percentage-of-current-health-expenditure-%28che%29-%28-%29), [Domestic private health expenditure (PVT-D) per capita in US$](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/domestic-private-health-expenditure-%28pvt-d%29-per-capita-in-usd)

[Use of earmarked excise tax on beverages](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--use-of-earmarked-excise-tax-on-alcoholic-beverages), [Excise taxes are applied on beverages](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--excise-taxes-are-applied-on-non-alcoholic-beverages), [Automatic adjustment of specific excise on beverage](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--automatic-adjustment-of-specific-excise-on-alcoholic-beverage), [Type of excise tax applied on beverage](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--type-of-excise-tax-applied-on-non-alcoholic-beverage), [Import duties on beverages (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--import-duties-on-nonalcoholic-beverages), [Other taxes on beverages (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/population-median-age-%28years%29), [Beverage price](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/beverage-affordability-less-affordable-nonalcoholic), [If tiered on the beverage, the tiers are sugar-content-based](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--if-tiered-on-the-beverage--the-tiers-are-sugar-content-based), [Sugar-content of beverage (g/100ml)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-smoking-any-tobacco-product-among-persons-aged--15-years), [Total taxes on beverages (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--total-taxes-on-nonalcoholic-beverages), [Value-added/sales tax on beverages (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--value-added-sales-tax-on-nonalcoholic-beverages)

resources.description:
*Hepatitis:*
[Deaths caused by chronic hepatitis B (HBV) infection (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-deaths-caused-by-chronic-hepatitis), [Chronic hepatitis B (HBV) infected persons diagnosed (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-chronic-hepatitis-infected-persons-diagnosed), [Chronic hepatitis B (HBV) diagnosis coverage as a percentage of infected (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis--diagnosis-coverage-of-chronic-hepatitis-%28hbv-and-hcv%29-as-a-percentage-of-infected), [New chronic hepatitis B (HBV) infections (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---new-infections), [Prevalence of chronic hepatitis B (HBV) in the general population (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---prevalence-of-chronic-hepatitis-among-the-general-population), [Persons on chronic hepatitis B (HBV) treatment (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-chronic-hepatitis-b-infected-persons-treated), [Chronic hepatitis B (HBV) treatment rate as percentage of diagnosed (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---chronic-hepatitis-treatment-rate-as-percentage-of-diagnosed), [Deaths caused by chronic hepatitis C (HCV) infection (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-deaths-caused-by-chronic-hepatitis), [Chronic hepatitis C (HCV) infected persons diagnosed, including cured (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-chronic-hepatitis-infected-persons-diagnosed), [Chronic hepatitis C (HCV) infected persons diagnosed (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-chronic-hepatitis-infected-persons-diagnosed), [Chronic hepatitis C (HCV) diagnosis coverage as percentage of total HCV infected, including cured (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis--diagnosis-coverage-of-chronic-hepatitis-%28hbv-and-hcv%29-as-a-percentage-of-infected), [New chronic hepatitis C (HCV) infections (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---new-infections), [Prevalence of chronic hepatitis C (HCV) ) in the general population (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---prevalence-of-chronic-hepatitis-among-the-general-population), [Persons on chronic hepatitis C (HCV) treatment, cumulative (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-persons-initiated-hepatitis-c-treatment--latest-year-and-cumulative-over-a-period-of-years), [Persons initiated chronic hepatitis C(HCV) treatment (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---number-of-persons-initiated-hepatitis-c-treatment--latest-year-and-cumulative-over-a-period-of-years), [Chronic hepatitis C (HCV) treatment rate as percentage of diagnosed (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/hepatitis---chronic-hepatitis-treatment-rate-as-percentage-of-diagnosed)

resources.description:
*Oral Health:*
[Dentists (per 10,000)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/dentists-%28per-10-000-population%29), [Dentists (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/dentists-%28number%29), [Dental Assistants and Therapists (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/dental-assistants-and-therapists-%28number%29), [Dental Prosthetic Technicians (number)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/dental-prosthetic-technicians-%28number%29), [Affordability of fluoride toothpaste](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/affordability-of-fluoride-toothpaste), [Per capita expenditure on dental healthcare (US$)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/per-capita-expenditure-on-dental-healthcare-%28us-dollar%29), [Total expenditure on dental healthcare in million (US$)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-expenditure-on-dental-healthcare-in-million-%28us-dollar%29), [Prevalence of edentulism in people 20+ years (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-edentulism-in-people-20--years), [Number of labour days needed to buy annual supply of fluoride toothpaste per person](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-labour-days-needed-to-buy-annual-supply-of-fluoride-toothpaste-per-person), [Dental prosthetic technicians (per 10 000 population)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/oral-health--dental-prosthetic-technicians), [Presence of dedicated staff for oral health working on NCDs at the MoH](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/presence-of-dedicated-staff-for-oral-health-working-on-ncds-at-the-moh), [Oral health: Noma recognized as a national public health problem](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/noma-recognized-as-a-national-public-health-problem), [Total productivity losses due to 5 oral diseases in million (US$)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-productivity-losses-due-to-5-oral-diseases-in-million-%28us-dollar%29), [Prevalence of severe periodontal disease in people 15+ year (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-severe-periodontal-disease-in-people-15--years), [Per capita availability of refined sugar (g/day)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ORALHEALTH_SUGAR_AVAILABILITY), [Prevalence of untreated caries of deciduous teeth in children 1-9 years (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-untreated-caries-of-deciduous-teeth-in-children-1-9-years), [Prevalence of untreated caries of permanent teeth in people 5+ years (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-untreated-caries-of-permanent-teeth-in-people-5--years), [Alcohol, total per capita (15+) consumption (in litres of pure alcohol) (SDG Indicator 3.5.2), three-year average](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-%28recorded-unrecorded%29-alcohol-per-capita-%2815-%29-consumption), [Sugar-content of beverage (g/100ml)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-smoking-any-tobacco-product-among-persons-aged--15-years), [Total taxes on beverages (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tax--total-taxes-on-nonalcoholic-beverages)

[Availability of national standards or recommended lists of medical devices](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/availability-of-national-standards-or-recommended-lists-of-medical-devices), [Types of lists recommending health technology for high burden diseases](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/types-of-lists-recommending-health-technology-for-high-burden-diseases), [Total density per million population: Magnetic Resonance Imaging](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-million-population-magnetic-resonance-imaging), [Total density per million population: Computed tomography units](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/total-density-per-million-population-computed-tomography-units), [Total density per million resources.description:
*Resources for Substance Use Disorders:*
[Government unit/official responsible for prevention for substance use](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/government-unit-official-responsible-for-prevention-for-substance-use), [Ministry/office that takes primary responsibility for prevention for substance use](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ministry-office-that-takes-primary-responsibility-for-prevention-for-substance-use), [Five years change in international cooperation for prevention for substance use](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/five-years-change-in-international-cooperation-for-prevention-for-substance-use), [Government unit/official responsible for treatment of substance use disorders](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/government-unit-official-responsible-for-treatment-of-substance-use-disorders), [Ministry/office that takes primary responsibility for treatment of substance use disorders](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/ministry-office-that-takes-primary-responsibility-for-treatment-of-substance-use-disorders), [Involvement of representatives of affected or targeted populations in the development and formulation of policies and strategies for treatment of substance use disorders](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/involvement-of-representatives-of-affected-or-targeted-populations-in-the-development-and-formulation-of-policies-and-strategies-for-treatment-of-substance-use-disorders), [Involvement of representatives of affected or targeted populations in the development and implementation of national programmes for treatment of substance use disorders](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/involvement-of-representatives-of-affected-or-targeted-populations-in-the-development-and-implementation-of-national-programmes-for-treatment-of-substance-use-disorders), [Involvement of representatives of affected or targeted populations in the development and formulation of policies and strategies for prevention for alcohol and drugs](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/involvement-of-representatives-of-affected-or-targeted-populations-in-the-development-and-formulation-of-policies-and-strategies-for-prevention-for-alcohol-and-drugs), [Involvement of representatives of affected or targeted populations in the development and implementation of national programmes for prevention for alcohol and drugs](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/involvement-of-representatives-of-affected-or-targeted-populations-in-the-development-and-implementation-of-national-programmes-for-prevention-for-alcohol-and-drugs), [Five years change in international cooperation for treatment of substance use with alcohol use disorders in the criminal justice with drug use disorders in the criminal justice resources for prevention for substance use](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/five-year-change-in-government-resources-for-prevention-for-substance-use), [Five-year change in government resources for treatment of substance use resources.description:
*Road Safety:*
[Existence of a national drink-driving law](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-a-national-drink-driving-law), [Definition of drink-driving by BAC](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/definition-of-drink-driving-by-bac), [Blood Alcohol Concentration (BAC) limit for drivers](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/blood-alcohol-concentration-%28bac%29-limit-for-drivers), [Attribution of road traffic deaths to alcohol (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/attribution-of-road-traffic-deaths-to-alcohol-%28-%29), [Existence of a national seat-belt law](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-a-national-seat-belt-law), [Applicability of seat-belt law to all occupants](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/applicability-of-seat-belt-law-to-all-occupants), [Seat-belt wearing rate (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/seat-belt-wearing-rate-%28-%29), [Existence of a national child-restraint law](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-a-national-child-restraint-law), [Existence of national speed limits](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-national-speed-limits), [Maximum speed limits](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/maximum-speed-limits), [Applicability of national motorcycle helmet law to all occupants](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/applicability-of-national-motorcycle-helmet-law-to-all-occupants), [Law requires helmet to be fastened](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/law-requires-helmet-to-be-fastened), [Existence of a road safety lead agency](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-a-road-safety-lead-agency), [Existence of a national road safety strategy](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-a-national-road-safety-strategy), [Availability of funding for national road safety strategy](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/availability-of-funding-for-national-road-safety-strategy), [Existence of a universal access telephone number for pre-hospital care](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/existence-of-a-universal-access-telephone-number-for-pre-hospital-care)

resources.description:
*Sexually Transmitted Infections:*
[Congenital syphilis number of cases, reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/congenital-syphilis-number-of-reported-cases), [Antenatal care attendees who were positive for syphilis (%), reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/antenatal-care-attendees-who-were-positive-for-syphilis-%28-%29), [Women accessing antenatal care (ANC) services who were tested for syphilis (%), reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/women-accessing-antenatal-care-%28anc%29-services-who-were-tested-for-syphilis-%28-%29), [Antenatal care attendees positive for syphilis who received treatment (%), reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/antenatal-care-attendees-positive-for-syphilis-who-received-treatment-%28-%29), [Congenital syphilis rate per 100 000 live births, reported](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/congenital-syphilis-rate-per-100-000-live-births), [Incident rate of active syphilis (per 1000)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/incident-rate-of-active-syphilis-%28per-1000%29), [Incident cases of active syphilis in 15-49 year olds (in thousands)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/incident-cases-of-syphilis-in-individuals-%28in-millions%29), [Prevalence of active syphilis in 15-49 year olds (%)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalence-of-active-syphilis-in-individuals-%28-%29), [Prevalent cases of active syphilis (in thousands)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/prevalent-cases-of-active-syphilis-%28in-millions%29)

resources.description:
*Tobacco control:*
[Tobacco Enforce bans: E1 direct advertising](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-enforce-bans--e1-direct-advertising), [Tobacco Enforce bans: E2 indirect advertising](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-enforce-bans--e2-indirect-advertising), [Tobacco Enforce bans: E3 indirect advertising, additional bans](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-enforce-bans--e3-indirect-advertising--additional-bans), [Tobacco Monitor: population-based national surveys, tobacco use and smoking](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/monitor--m1-population-based-national-surveys--use-and-smoking), [Tobacco Monitor: population-based national surveys, smokeless tobacco or e-cigarettes](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/monitor--m2-population-based-national-surveys--smokeless-or-e-cigarettes), [Tobacco Monitor: school-based national surveys, tobacco use, tobacco smoking, and cigarette smoking](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/monitor--m3-school-based-national-surveys--use-and-smoking), [Tobacco Monitor: school-based national surveys, smokeless tobacco or e-cigarettes](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-monitor--m4-school-based-national-surveys--smokeless-or-e-cigarettes), [Tobacco MPOWER: National tobacco control programmes (NTCP)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mpower--national-control-programmes-%28ntcp%29), [Tobacco Offer help: O1 Support for treatment of tobacco dependence / Availability of smoking cessation support](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/offer-help--o1-support-for-treatment-of-dependence), [Tobacco Offer help: O2 Availability of tobacco cessation medications](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/offer-help--o2-availability-of-cessation-medications), [Tobacco MPOWER overview: Monitor, Protect people, Offer help, Warn of dangers, Enforce bans, Raise taxes](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mpower-overview--monitor--protect-people--offer-help--warn-of-dangers--enforce-bans--raise-taxes), [Tobacco MPOWER Protect people: P1 smoke-free places (national legislation)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/protect-people--p1-smoke-free-places), [Tobacco MPOWER Protect people: P2 smoke-free places, additional characteristics](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/protect-people--p2-smoke-free-places--additional-characteristics), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Affordability](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--affordability), [Tobacco Raise taxes:  Reported use of earmarked tobacco taxes](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--reported-use-of-earmarked-taxes), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Inflation-adjusted prices for most sold brand of cigarettes](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--inflation-adjusted-prices-for-most-sold-brand-of-cigarettes), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Retail price for tobacco and nicotine products](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--retail-price-for-and-nicotine-products), [Tobacco Raise taxes: National taxes for tobacco and nicotine products](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--national-taxes-for-and-nicotine-products), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Tax administration](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--tax-administration), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Annual tax revenues from tobacco products, latest reporting period](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--annual-tax-revenues-from-products--latest-reporting-period), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Annual tax revenues from tobacco products, previous reporting period](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--annual-tax-revenues-from-products--previous-reporting-period), [Tobacco Raise taxes: Tobacco tax structure](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-raise-taxes--tax-structure), [Tobacco Warning: W1a cigarette packaging health warnings](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w1a-cigarette-packaging-health-warnings), [Tobacco Warning: W1b smoked tobacco packaging health warnings](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w1b-smoked-packaging-health-warnings), [Tobacco Warning: W1c smokeless tobacco packaging health warnings](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w1c-smokeless-packaging-health-warnings), [Tobacco Warning: W2a cigarette packaging health warnings, other characteristics](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w2a-cigarette-packaging-health-warnings--other-characteristics), [Tobacco Warning: W2b smoked tobacco packaging health warnings, other characteristics](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w2b-smoked-packaging-health-warnings--other-characteristics), [Tobacco Warning: W2c smokeless tobacco packaging health warnings, other characteristics](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w2c-smokeless-packaging-health-warnings--other-characteristics), [Tobacco Warning: W3 anti-tobacco mass-media campaigns](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/tobacco-warning--w3-anti-mass-media-campaigns)

*Water, sanitation and hygiene (WASH):*
[Amount of water- and sanitation-related official development assistance that is part of a government-coordinated spending plan (constant 2024 US$ millions)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/amount-of-water--and-sanitation-related-official-development-assistance-that-is-part-of-a-government-coordinated-spending-plan), [Mortality rate attributed to exposure to unsafe WASH services (per 100 000 population) (SDG 3.9.2)](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/mortality-rate-attributed-to-exposure-to-unsafe-wash-services-%28per-100-000-population%29-%28sdg-3-9-2%29), [SDG 3.9.2 WASH deaths](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/sdg-3-9-2-wash-deaths), [Number of diarrhoea deaths from inadequate water, sanitation and hygiene](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-diarrhoea-deaths-from-inadequate-water-sanitation-and-hygiene), [Number of diarrhoea deaths from inadequate hygiene](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-diarrhoea-deaths-from-inadequate-hygiene), [Number of diarrhoea deaths from inadequate sanitation](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-diarrhoea-deaths-from-inadequate-sanitation), [Number of diarrhoea deaths from inadequate water](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/number-of-diarrhoea-deaths-from-inadequate-water), [Attributable fraction of diarrhoea to inadequate water, sanitation and hygiene](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/attributable-fraction-of-diarrhoea-to-inadequate-water-sanitation-and-hygiene), [Attributable fraction of diarrhoea to inadequate hygiene](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/attributable-fraction-of-diarrhoea-to-inadequate-hygiene), [Attributable fraction of diarrhoea to inadequate sanitation](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/attributable-fraction-of-diarrhoea-to-inadequate-sanitation), [Attributable fraction of diarrhoea to inadequate water](https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/indicators/indicator-details/GHO/attributable-fraction-of-diarrhoea-to-inadequate-water), [Number of diarrhoea DALYs from inadequate water, sanitation and
